steps.name: Fix compilation error + start aichatsystem server at port 4002
steps.description: Fixed $fast_check→$avail_check in AI.pm chat action (line 1850). Confirmed AI.pm compiles cleanly. Started aichatsystem-ef4e at port 4002. Root cause identified: port 4001 was planningsystem branch, not aichatsystem.

steps.name: Planning integration + Schema Compare AI + Grok 410 fix
steps.description: COMPLETED: project_id/task_id/model on ai_conversations; _build_project_context injected into AI prompt; AI activity panels on todo/project/day templates; project_conversations endpoint (project+task); schema_compare guided fix with sync_schema_field ACTION; Grok pre-flight deprecated-model check; chain_query in Ollama.pm; branch merged with main.

steps.name: Merge aichatsystem-ef4e to main
steps.description: Merge the worktree branch to main. Key files: AI.pm (guest sessions, planning integration, schema compare AI, Grok 410 fix), Ollama.pm (chain_query, keep-alive), AiConversation.pm (project_id/task_id/model), Project.pm (has_many ai_conversations), day.tt/details.tt/projectdetails.tt (AI activity panels), conversations.tt, ai_conversation_tables.sql, database-standards.md.

steps.name: AI Project Planning Agent
steps.description: When a user asks AI to create a new feature/project, the AI should: (1) prompt user about dependencies (inventory, accounting, etc.), (2) examine existing projects for blockers, (3) create project/sub-project/todo structure via create_todo ACTION, (4) link to existing projects as blockers where possible. Requires: new AI agent type 'planning', enhanced create_todo ACTION to accept project dependencies, and prompt engineering for dependency discovery.

steps.name: 3D Print Management Agent
steps.description: Add a '3d' agent type to the AI system, focused on 3D printing project management. Similar to BMaster/ENCY agents: inject apiary-style schema context (print jobs, filament inventory, printer status), Bambu/OrcaSlicer API awareness if available, and bee-welfare-equivalent philosophy (what is best for the print, not just speed). Cross-branch request: 3D printing branch should add a sub-project/todo to its project that blocks on this aichatsystem agent being ready.
